name_en: Top-tier Original M13099 Black This Marellini handbag features richly textured Epi leather in a refined silhouette, offering ample space for daily essentials like smartphones. The round coin purse and mirror are crafted from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami colorful Monogram canvas, secured to the bag body with a rugged metal chain. 19 x 13.5 x 6.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
